scripts.test: npm run test:scripts && npm --workspace @maka/core test && npm --workspace @maka/storage test && npm --workspace @maka/runtime test && npm --workspace @maka/computer-use test && npm --workspace @maka/headless test && npm --workspace maka-agent test && npm --workspace @maka/ui test && npm --workspace @maka/desktop test
scripts.test:dist: npm run test:scripts && npm exec -w @maka/core -- node --test "dist/**/*.test.js" && npm exec -w @maka/storage -- node --test "dist/**/*.test.js" && npm exec -w @maka/runtime -- node --test "dist/**/*.test.js" && npm exec -w @maka/computer-use -- node --test "dist/**/*.test.js" && npm exec -w @maka/headless -- node ../../scripts/run-headless-tests.mjs && npm exec -w maka-agent -- node --test "dist/**/*.test.js" && npm exec -w @maka/ui -- node --test "dist/**/*.test.js" && npm --workspace @maka/desktop run test:dist
scripts.test:scripts: node --test scripts/run-headless-tests.test.mjs scripts/sync-model-metadata.test.mjs scripts/cua-driver-provenance.test.mjs scripts/cu-real-e2e-contract.test.mjs scripts/cu-process-restart-e2e-contract.test.mjs scripts/cu-e2e-fixture.test.mjs scripts/cu-e2e-scenarios.test.mjs scripts/cu-provider-matrix.test.mjs scripts/cu-report-sanitize.test.mjs scripts/cu-real-model-launcher.test.mjs scripts/cu-real-ax-model-e2e-contract.test.mjs
scripts.dev:full: npm run build && npm --workspace @maka/desktop run start
scripts.build: npm --workspace @maka/core run build && npm --workspace @maka/storage run build && npm --workspace @maka/runtime run build && npm --workspace @maka/computer-use run build && npm --workspace @maka/headless run build && npm --workspace maka-agent run build && npm --workspace @maka/ui run build && npm --workspace @maka/desktop run build
scripts.build:test: npm --workspace @maka/core run build && npm --workspace @maka/storage run build && npm --workspace @maka/runtime run build && npm --workspace @maka/computer-use run build && npm --workspace @maka/headless run build && npm --workspace maka-agent run build && npm --workspace @maka/ui run build && npm --workspace @maka/desktop run build:test
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.check:release: npm run check:stale && npm run check:officecli-bundle && node scripts/check-dead-css.mjs --check
